description_long: This bungalow features a brick exterior with a mix of rectangular and circular windows, giving it a distinctive and modern appearance. The property is surrounded by a brick wall and includes a lush garden with several mature trees and flowering shrubs. A swimming pool is situated in the backyard, adjacent to a green lawn and a covered patio area. The house has two visible stories, with the upper floor set back and featuring large windows and a balcony. There is a driveway with a carport on one side, and the main entrance is accessible from a paved area. The overall layout is open, with outdoor living spaces integrated into the design, and the roof is predominantly flat with some parapet walls.
description: A modern brick bungalow with two stories, a flat roof, large windows, a garden, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a brick wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, and a lush garden with trees and flowering plants.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, green lawn, and the upper story with large windows.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, extensive lawn, and the rear facade with a covered patio and balcony.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the garden, trees, and the side wall with multiple windows and a green privacy fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and circular windows
